title: Spherical Glass Jar With Cork Lid Airtight - 17oz Candy Jar Kitchen Glass Jar - for Preserving and Storing Coffee, Spice, Beans, Sugar, Apothecary etc (2)
description:
About this item
【Safe material】Clear high-grade borosilicate glass, it does not discolor, retain smells or leach chemicals into food. The airtight lid is made of cork, keep food longer and fresher,withstand the instantaneous temperature difference of 0℃-100℃.
【Functional】: Can be used with various foods and herbs in the kitchen, such as candy, beans, flour, tea, nuts, cereals, peppercorns, coffee, etc
【Wide mouth design】Sleek glass surface and wide mouth help you deposit and take out as well as cleaning easily. The airtight cork lid creates an airtight and healthy environment for storing
【Stylish design glass jar】This jar has a contemporary design with a visible display. Get your kitchen organized and make storing conveniently and looks great on your counter, bathroom vanity, dresser, a beautiful complement to house decorating.You can even use him to make eco bottle ball moss DIY bonsai
【Safety Guarantee】: Buy with confidence: We are a trusted kitchen brand with thousands of satisfied customers. If you are not satisfied with these glass bottles, Please contact us and we will give you a satisfactory solution

reviews_5s: Great quality and appearance.Bought these for a post-Thanksgiving crafternoon activity: making moss terrariums, which need to be enclosed to maintain higher humidity. They're well packaged, perfectly cute sized for my office desk.Purchased as a Mother's Day gift and she loved itI used these for beach sand from Florida to display, love them and the worked perfectIt looks cool in my kitchenPerfect size and good quality also came on time! Great for what I needed it forShipping was quick! These little jars were the perfect accessory for my beachy motif in my home. Can imagine it for all sorts of decorative uses.I use these pretty jars for seashells I find on the beach,Nice glass with cork top. Very usefulThese jars are great for smaller items. For example I use mine for paper clips and erasers in my home office. They advertise that you could keep candy, coffee, tea, etc…. I don’t use them for any of those items due to the small size of the jar. You would have to refill them constantly. But, other than that I would recommend to anyone wanting to decorate there office, classroom, or home.
